# MultiRoundTrip.IsRecognizedInputRequestMethod method

Returns `true` when *method* is one of the three recognized input-request kinds (R-11.2-k).

```csharp
public static bool IsRecognizedInputRequestMethod(string method)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| method | The input-request method name. |

## Return Value

`true` when recognized.
